titleStmt.title: SII 6.956: original edition by K. V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 956. (A.R. No. 309-F of 1899). IN THE SAME PLACE.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . śākābdē bhūtabāṇadyumaṇisugaṇitē māsi cāṣāḍasaṁjñē dvādaśyāṁ śuklapakṣē
(kṣē) suragurudivasē śrīnṛsiṁhasya viṣṇōḥ . śrīmannāgasya gōtraprabhavaśubhayaśāḥ sū¨ryya
janyāprasūtaḥ prādāt satpuṣpamālāḥ pratidinamamalāḥ puṇyavān puṇyavṛ
dhyai . 1 māhēśvararāvuttarāyaḥ śrīmānakalmāṣaḥ . nāripeddi[¨r]nṛsiṁhyasya nāyakō
bhaṁḍarūpakaṁ . 2 Annamāḍadvayaṁ kṛtvā niṣkairaṣṭabhiranvahaṁ . tadēva vētanaṁkṛtvā
mālāyā vinivēdanē . 3 datvā tapyaiṣa tatsa¨rvvaṁ mālākāraṁ vidhāyataṁ . Aka
lpayadimaṁ dha¨rmmamākalpaṁ kalpakōpamaḥ . 4 svāyurārōgyayaśasāṁ sukasaṁtta
tivṛdhdhayē . pālayaṁtvaniśaṁ dha¨rmmamimaṁ vaiṣṇavasattamāḥ . 5 svasti śrī . śāka va¨rṣaṁbulu
1255 gunēṇṭi Āṣāḍa śukla 12 guruvāramuna surujubhuḍujīyyana koḍku māhēśvaradāsaravu
turāyaṁḍu tanaku puṇyamugā nāripeddi narasiṁhunāyakaprasāda kuṁcālu reṁḍu Enimidi mā
ḍalu 8 ṭiki ṭhāvupaṭṭina prāsādamu Ītaḍu kuḍici tipirinarasiṁhucē vilicina tōṁṭayaṁdu puṣpavāṭika peṭṭi I
tōṁṭa ṣpālu tirumāla beṭi nityamu śrīnarasiṁhanāthuniki cātiṁpaṁgalāṁḍu I dha¨rmmu Ācaṁdrā¨rkkamugā śrīvaiṣṇavō
ttamula rakṣa . śrī
Digital edition of SII 6.956 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
